title: Rich Yeasty Brazilian Fettuccine Pasta
description: A yeasty and shattering Brazilian dish featuring fettuccine, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot, with a rich and creamy sauce, onion and garlic free.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a small bowl, proof the yeast by mixing it with 1 tablespoon of warm water and let it sit for 5 minutes.
In a large ttukbaegi earthenware pot, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the shredded brazilian cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the milk, salt, and black pepper, and stir until the sauce is heated through.
Add the cooked fettuccine to the cheese sauce and stir until well combined.
Add the proofed yeast and stir until the sauce is yeasty and shattering.
Transfer the fettuccine to a serving dish and top with chopped fresh parsley.
